seoTitle: BCSD Calendar 2025-2026: Bakersfield Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: BCSD 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 13 first day, May 29 last day, two-hour delayed starts, Thanksgiving, Winter Break, Spring Break, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Bakersfield City School District lists 180 total school days for 2025-2026. The first day of school is August 13, 2025 and the last day of school is May 29, 2026. Winter Break runs December 22, 2025 through January 2, 2026, creating the longest scheduled student break. Spring Break runs March 30 through April 3, 2026, followed by an April 6 holiday in lieu of Admission Day. The calendar marks two-hour delayed-start collaboration days on September 11, October 16, November 20, December 18, January 22, February 19, March 12, and April 9. Parent-teacher conference windows run October 20-24, 2025 and March 23-27, 2026. June 1 and June 2 are reserved as student attendance days only if needed to maintain 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does BCSD start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Bakersfield City School District starts the 2025-2026 school year on Wednesday, August 13, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is BCSD Winter Break in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 22, 2025 through Friday, January 2, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is BCSD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 30 through Friday, April 3, 2026. The district also lists Monday, April 6, 2026 as a holiday in lieu of Admission Day.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for BCSD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 29, 2026. June 1 and June 2 may be used only if additional student attendance days are needed.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 13, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar lists 180 total school days.

yearNumbers.label: Delayed Starts
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar marks eight two-hour delayed-start collaboration days.
